attacking_style: Opportunistic late-race solo attacks in finales, attempting to capitalize on tactical confusion or gaps in peloton discipline when domestique duties are complete.
team_tactics: Functions primarily as domestique but given freedom for opportunistic moves late in race when team leadership objectives are secured or unlikely.
terrain_preference: Insufficient data to determine specific terrain preferences, though showed ability to attack in hilly stage race finales.
vulnerability: Solo attacks easily controlled by organized teams with sprint interests (e.g., Bora-hansgrohe); lacks sustained power or support to make opportunistic moves stick against disciplined pelotons.
key_patterns: Launches solo attacks late in races despite domestique role, showing tactical awareness.
Attacks can create initial panic but get shut down by disciplined team tempo control.
Displays sufficient strength reserves after domestique work to attempt finale opportunism.
form_trajectory: unknown: single race observation from 2018 insufficient to determine trajectory or current form
